items.title_en: Most stocks are sitting out this move to record highs
items.title_zh: 大多数股票都在观望这一创纪录高点的走势
items.desc_en: Scott Rubner of Citadel Securities pointed out that only 22% of S&P 500 members have outperformed the benchmark over the past 30 days.
items.desc_zh: Citadel 证券公司的斯科特·鲁布纳 (Scott Rubner) 指出，标准普尔 500 指数成分股中只有 22% 在过​​去 30 天的表现优于基准。

items.title_en: Paul Tudor Jones says AI bull market has 'another year or two to run'
items.title_zh: 保罗·都铎·琼斯 (Paul Tudor Jones) 表示人工智能牛市“还将持续一两年”
items.desc_en: The billionaire hedge fund manager said the market may still be in the middle innings of an AI-driven rally.
items.desc_zh: 这位亿万富翁对冲基金经理表示，市场可能仍处于人工智能驱动的反弹的中期。

items.title_en: This 'win-win' hedge trade is getting popular with traders
items.title_zh: 这种“双赢”的对冲交易越来越受到交易者的欢迎
items.desc_en: The trade is fairly simple: sell downside protection in semiconductor names where volatility is expensive, and buy downside protection in the S&P 500, where it's relatively cheap.
items.desc_zh: 交易相当简单：在波动性较高的半导体股中卖出下行保护，并在相对便宜的标准普尔 500 指数中买入下行保护。

items.desc_en: Propy, a Miami-based blockchain technology company that launched in 2017, has been trying to modernize the closing process for residential homes.

items.title_en: Whirlpool says Iran war causing 'recession-level industry decline.' The shares are down 20%
items.title_zh: 惠而浦表示，伊朗战争导致“经济衰退级别的工业衰退”。股价下跌20%
items.desc_en: "War in Iran resulted in recession-level industry decline in the U.S. as consumer confidence collapsed in late February and March," the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示：“随着消费者信心在二月底和三月崩溃，伊朗战争导致美国工业出现衰退水平。”

items.title_en: Race to trace passengers who left hantavirus cruise ship at island
items.title_zh: 竞相追踪在岛上离开汉坦病毒游轮的乘客
items.desc_en: A 69-year-old woman who later died in South Africa is among those who left MV Hondius at St Helena.
items.desc_zh: 在圣赫勒拿岛离开 MV Hondius 的人中包括一名 69 岁的妇女，后来在南非去世。

items.title_en: Families still see college as a good investment — figuring out how to pay for it is the challenge
items.title_zh: 家庭仍然认为大学是一项不错的投资——弄清楚如何支付学费是一个挑战
items.desc_en: Roughly 82% of families with high school students considering college say they believe it will be worth the high cost, according to a new report by Sallie.
items.desc_zh: Sallie 的一份新报告显示，大约 82% 的有高中生考虑上大学的家庭表示，他们相信付出高昂的代价是值得的。

items.title_en: Amazon to carry Ozempic pill at U.S. kiosks, offer same-day delivery
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将在美国售货亭出售 Ozempic 药丸并提供当日送达服务
items.desc_en: Amazon said on Thursday its pharmacy will stock Novo Nordisk's Ozempic pill to treat type 2 diabetes at its kiosks and ⁠offer same-day delivery of the drug.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊周四表示，其药房将在其售货亭备有诺和诺德 (Novo Nordisk) 治疗 2 型糖尿病的 Ozempic 药丸，并提供当日送达服务。

items.desc_zh: 卢比奥的罗马挑战：管理盟友，向教皇发出呼吁 politico.eu 与特朗普关系紧张数周后，卢比奥会见了教皇利奥

items.title_en: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
items.title_zh: 自真主党停火以来，以色列首次袭击贝鲁特
items.desc_en: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.
items.desc_zh: 以色列表示，袭击目标是首都真主党的一名高级人物，这是自四月中旬以来的首次此类袭击。

items.title_en: Goodbye quarterly earnings? Here's when traders believe this big change will happen
items.title_zh: 告别季度收益？这是交易者相信这一重大变化将会发生的时候
items.desc_en: Traders are evenly divided as to whether the change will happen by Jan. 1. That would be an unusually fast timeline for the commission.
items.desc_zh: 对于是否会在 1 月 1 日之前发生这一变化，交易员们意见不一。对于委员会来说，这将是一个异常快的时间表。

items.title_en: CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87
items.title_zh: CNN 创始人特德·特纳去世，享年 87 岁
items.desc_en: The media mogul pioneered the modern 24-hour news culture when he launched the Cable News Network in 1980.
items.desc_zh: 这位媒体大亨于 1980 年创办了有线电视新闻网，开创了现代 24 小时新闻文化。

items.title_en: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
items.title_zh: 阿拉斯加特大海啸是有记录以来第二大的海啸
items.desc_en: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.
items.desc_zh: 新的研究表明，气候变化导致的冰川融化正在增加巨浪的风险。

items.title_en: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
items.title_zh: 机器人战争——乌克兰的一次行动告诉我们关于不久的将来的战场
items.desc_en: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?
items.desc_zh: 在乌克兰总统泽伦斯基表示仅使用机器人和无人机就占领了领土之后，无人战争的未来是什么？

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.title_en: 'I thought he was going to hit me' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
items.title_zh: OpenAI 联合创始人谈到马斯克时说：“我以为他会打我”
items.desc_en: Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.
items.desc_zh: 布罗克曼是在马斯克和 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼为期一个月的试验的第二周发表讲话的。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: A sleep apnoea wearable. Plus, tech to free up hospital beds and a breast health app.
items.desc_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停可穿戴设备。此外，还有可释放医院床位的技术和乳房健康应用程序。

items.title_en: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
items.title_zh: 美国将对谷歌、微软、xAI 的新人工智能模型进行安全测试
items.desc_en: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.
items.desc_zh: 这些公司与商务部之间的新协议以拜登时代的协议为基础。

items.title_en: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
items.title_zh: Pornhub 将再次对一些英国用户开放
items.desc_en: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.
items.desc_zh: 完成 Apple 基于设备的年龄检查的英国 iPhone 用户将不再被阻止访问该网站的成人内容。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.title_en: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。
